title: Stellar Client
description: A modpack for most modern versions allowing for performant and aesthetic gameplay. Originally made for the Stellar Minecraft Server.
body:
![Stunning Built-In Shaders!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dybDcEeo/images/d48be1686e663793f98f329e08a976319403ecef.png)
Comes with shader compatibility!

## Summary
Stellar Client is a client-side modpack designed for aesthetical and optimised Minecraft gameplay, especially whilst playing on the StellarMC minecraft server.

## Why should I install this?
Stellar Client features many quality of life improvements included, and has numerous optimisation mods to make your game run just that little bit smoother. Your gameplay will be clean and buttery smooth no matter how you play.

## StellarMC Server
This pack is specifically designed for playing on the StellarMC Minecraft Server, however anyone can use this pack to use on any server or world!
You can join StellarMC by using this IP in Minecraft ([pack.stellarmc.top](https://stellarmc.top/)).

## Authors
- Waffler
- MrDrakify
- Stellarite Interactive (Plashost)
- Contributing mod developers

## Credits
We do not own nor maintain any of the mods provided with this pack, nor are we partnered with them.
View each mod's resource page by checking them out either in game or on the content page.

## License additions
You may not redistribute this modpack without prior permission from the mod authors.
Doing so would be a breach of licence and will result in the termination of your access.
